Data.Name: User Set Sound Record State
Data.Comment: User setting for Sound record from SR on CAN

Data.Name: User Set Location Info Record State
Data.Comment: User setting for GPS info record from SR on CAN

Data.Name: User Set Driving Info Record State
Data.Comment: User setting for Vehicle overlay record from SR on CAN

Data.Name: User Set Continuous Record Length State
Data.Comment: User setting for Continuous recording length from SR on CAN

Data.Name: User Set Customer Record Length State
Data.Comment: User setting for Customer recording length from SR on CAN

Data.Name: System Status
Data.Comment: System status from SR on CAN

Data.Name: Storage Format Status
Data.Comment: Storage format status from SR on CAN

Data.Name: Customer Record Status
Data.Comment: Customer recording status from SR on CAN

Data.Name: Automatic Record Status
Data.Comment: Automatic recording status from SR on CAN

Data.Name: Storage Status Display
Data.Comment: Storage status from SR on CAN

Data.Name: Storage Total Volume
Data.Comment: Storage total volume from SR on CAN

Data.Name: Storage Space Continuous Status
Data.Comment: Storage total space for Continuous recording folder from SR on CAN

Data.Name: Storage Used Continuous Status
Data.Comment: Storage used space for Continuous recording folder from SR on CAN

Data.Name: Storage Ratio Continous Status
Data.Comment: Storage protected ratio for Continuous recording folder from SR on CAN

Data.Name: Storage Free Continuous Status
Data.Comment: Storage free space for Continuous recording folder from SR on CAN

Data.Name: Storage Space Automatic Event Status
Data.Comment: Storage total space for Automatic event recording folder from SR on CAN

Data.Name: Storage Used Automatic Event Status
Data.Comment: Storage used space for Automatic event recording folder from SR on CAN

Data.Name: Storage Ratio Automatic Event Status
Data.Comment: Storage protected ratio for Automatic event recording folder from SR on CAN

Data.Name: Storage Free Automatic Event Status
Data.Comment: Storage free space for Automatic event recording folder from SR on CAN

Data.Name: Storage Space User Event Status
Data.Comment: Storage total space for User event recording folder from SR on CAN

Data.Name: Storage Used User Event Status
Data.Comment: Storage used space for User event recording folder from SR on CAN

Data.Name: Storage Ratio User Event Status
Data.Comment: Storage protected ratio for User event recording folder from SR on CAN

Data.Name: Storage Free User Event Status
Data.Comment: Storage free space for User event recording folder from SR on CAN

Data.Name: Automatic Event Mode
Data.Comment: SR Automatic event mode activation status

Data.Name: User Event Mode
Data.Comment: SR User event mode activation status

Data.Name: Vehicle Speed Diplay Type
Data.Comment: Config for Vehicle speed display type

Data.Name: Driving Info Display Type
Data.Comment: Config for Vehicle overlay display type

Data.Name: SessionName
Data.Comment: Diagnostic session values. See documentation for more information.

Data.Name: DTCFormatIdentifier
Data.Comment: for MVC DTC format - Renault/Nissan use value 0 (3 bytes DTC)

Item.Text: Device and failure type ODB codding
circuit short to ground or open
circuit short to battery or open
signal rate of change below threshold
signal rate of change above threshold
signal bias level out of range / zero adj. failure
signal has too few transitions / events
signal has too many transitions / events
alive / sequence counter incorrect / not updated
value of signal protection calculation incorrect
Component or sys. operation obstructed or blocked

Data.Name: IO Control for Main LED_send
Data.Comment: IO Control for the main LED

Data.Name: IO Control for On Off Switch_send
Data.Comment: IO Control for the On/Off switch

Data.Name: IO Control for On Off Switch_Receive
IO Control for User Event Switch_send
Data.Comment: IO Control for the User event switch

Data.Name: IO Control for User Event Switch_Receive
IO Control for Pedestrian LED_send
Data.Comment: IO Control for the pedestrian LED

Item.Text: Nor Flash I/O failure ( init / run time )
ipu register data run time incorrect
No possible classification about the type of fault
Open circuit or Short circuit to ground
Open circuit or Short circuit to battery

Data.Name: systemSupplierIdentifier
Data.Comment: Name and address information of the supplier.
Data.Description:
This value shall be used to reference the system supplier name and address information.

Record data content and format shall be server specific and defined by the system supplier.

Data.Name: ECUSerialNumber
Data.Description:
This value shall be used to reference the ECU (server) serial number.

Record data content and format shall be server specific.

Data.Name: vehicleManufacturerECUHardwareNumber
Data.Description:
This value shall be used by reading services to reference the vehicle-manufacturer-specific ECU (server) hardware number.

Record data content and format shall be serverspecific and defined by vehicle manufacturer.

Data.Name: systemSupplierECUSoftwareNumber
Data.Description:
This value shall be used to reference the system supplier specific ECU (server) software number.

Record data content and format shall be server specific and defined by the system supplier.

Data.Name: systemSupplierECUSoftwareVersionNumber
Data.Description:
This value shall be used to reference the system supplier specific ECU (server) software version number.

Record data content and format shall be server specific and defined by the system supplier.

Data.Name: diagnosticVersion
Data.Description:
This value shall be used to reference the diagnostic version of the ECU.

It is defined by the vehicle manufacturer.

Refer to manufacture ECU designer.

Item.Text: IO Control for SD format request
IO Control for On Off Switch
IO Control for User Event Switch
IO Control for User Event Switch backlight
IO Control for SD format request
IO Control for On Off Switch
IO Control for User Event Switch
IO Control for User Event Switch backlight

Data.Name: vehicleManufacturerSparePartNumber
Data.Comment: Ordered Part Number - This value shall contain the number of the part ordered by OEM
Data.Description:
This value shall be used to reference the vehicle manufacturer spare part number.

Record data content and format shall be server specific and defined by the vehicle manufacturer.

Item.Text: IO Control for On Off Switch
IO Control for User Event Switch
IO Control for User Event Switch backlight

Data.Name: LED Brightness for Main Green LED
LED Brightness for Main Orange LED
LED Brightness for User Event Button LED
IO Control for User evene backlight LED_send
Data.Comment: IO Control for the pedestrian LED

Item.Text: User Event backlight LED continuous ON

Data.Name: IO Control for User evene backlight LED_receive
Data.Comment: IO Control for the pedestrian LED

Item.Text: User Event backlight LED continuous ON

Data.Name: IO Control for Main error LED_send
Data.Comment: IO Control for the main error LED

Data.Name: IO Control for Main error LED_Receive
Data.Comment: IO Control for Main error LED_Receive

Data.Name: Configuration Data Reference After Configuration Process
IO Control for SD card format request

Request.Name: StartDiagnosticSession.Programming
Request.Comment: Standard definition for DDT2000 automatic screen

Request.Name: StartDiagnosticSession
Request.Comment: Standard definition for DDT2000 automatic screen

Request.Name: StartDiagnosticSession.ExtendedDiagnostic
Request.Comment: Standard definition for DDT2000 automatic screen

Request.Name: ClearDiagnosticInformation.All
Request.Comment: The ClearDiagnosticInformation service is used by the tool to clear diagnostic information in an ECUs memory

Request.Name: ReadDTCInformation.ReportNumberOfDTCByStatusMask
Request.Comment: Report number of DTC

Request.Name: ReadDTCInformation.ReportDTC
Request.Comment: DDT2000 Failures page requests / Clip import : Unusable in the standard tools of DDT2000

Request.Name: ReadDTCInformation.ReportSnapshot
Request.Comment: DDT2000 Failures page requests / Clip import : Unusable in the standard tools of DDT2000

Request.Name: ReadDTCInformation.ReportSupportedDTC
Request.Comment: Report supported DTC

Request.Name: TesterPresent.WithResponse
Request.Comment: This request enable P2P tester present for tool (Screen, IOctl, ...)
